undefined_macro.reason: preprocessor-heavy or macro-defined designs are not trustworthy after aggressive fallback

helper_collision.reason: helper collisions usually indicate low-value front-end artifacts

graph_empty.reason: graph conversion produced no usable structure

template_placeholder.reason: template placeholders imply incomplete source material

ram_or_macro_dependency.reason: RAM/macro-heavy designs need specialized macro semantics outside the current graph pipeline

semantic_reset_issue.reason: reset semantics cannot be safely rewritten in the generic auto-fix loop
